google.text: Shipping Instructions & Rate Confirmation Bill To: MVP Worldwide Logistics LLC 32 N. Summit Ave Patchogue, NY, 11772, US Phone: (631) 213-1566 Email: Operations@mvpwwl.com Carrier DAVUTRANS INC MC1440653 Carrier Note MVP Worldwide LOGISTICS Order #: GBGP11560047 Pickup Date: 08/14/2025 Mode: Reefer Carrier Phone Carrier Fax Equipment Total Amount (224) 281-7651 53' Reefer $1,050.00 USD Please sign and email back to the attention of MVP Worldwide Logistics. All accessorial charges MUST be pre-approved and billed with receipt and POD. All problems/reschedules MUST be handled through our office. PAYMENT: Requires a copy of BOL/Delivery Receipt/Signed Rate Confirmation. For prompt payment, Unload/Load receipts must be sent in at time of invoicing. Must reference MVP Order # on all correspondences. Send to accounting@MVPWWL.com. DETENTION: Drivers must have in/out times marked on the BOL for detention to be paid. The first 2 hours are free, and they will be compensated $50 per hour thereafter, with a max detention rate of $250, equivalent to a layover. If the driver arrives more than one hour past their appointment time, detention will not be valid. QUICK PAY: We do not offer quick pay to first-time carriers. After first-time use, you are then eligible. REEFER UNIT MUST BE PRECOOLED TO -10 DEGREES 1 HOUR PRIOR MUST PICKUP & DELIVER ON TIME. FAILURE TO NOTIFY OF ANY DELAYS WILL RESULT IN A RATE REDUCTION DRIVER MUST ADHERE TO MACROPOINT. FAILURE TO DO SO WILL RESULT IN A RATE REDUCTION Broker Contact Name Vincent Patti Pickup / Origin Mainline Foods - Hub 1700 Enterprise Way, STE 109 Marietta, GA, 30067, US Appointment/Hours Pickup Appointment: 08/14/2025 13:00 Dock Hours: between 8:00 and 12:00 Broker Contact Phone None Special Services None Selected Broker Contact Email vinnyp@mvpwwl.com Weight 30,000 lbs # Units Freight Description FROZEN FOOD PRODUCTS Special Instructions: DRIVER CAN REFERENCE BOL# 9818810291 FOR PICKUP PO #: PO00407227, PO00407236, PO00408087 Shipper Info: powered by Logistically TMS Shipping Instructions & Rate Confirmation Page 1 of 2
